subject: Re:
body:
Not yet. I will when I talk to him next - but not sure when that is.

BTW, should be expecting funding yet or after we figure out the pitch?

- Joi

subject: Re:
body:
when i told reid that obama just wanted to make money, he thought i was being cynical, as he was sure that doing good was going to be the goal
